title: Proactive vs Reactive Automation Guidelines
description: Ensure automations run automatically without human intervention

principles.description: Always prefer schedulers over manual triggers
principles.implementation: Use cron triggers or interval nodes as primary triggers

principles.description: Remove human intervention from routine tasks
principles.implementation: Automate decision points and approval workflows

principles.description: Include error handling and retry mechanisms
principles.implementation: Add error handling nodes and retry logic

examples: ❌ Manual Telegram command to scrape leads
❌ Human approval for every content post
❌ Manual button click to start workflow
✅ Automated content posting with human review queue
✅ Automatic data processing on file upload

webhookTemplates.name: file_upload_trigger
webhookTemplates.description: Triggers on file upload to specific folder
webhookTemplates.implementation: Use webhook node with file monitoring
